name: Possible Coin Miner CPU Priority Param
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
SIGMA Title: Possible Coin Miner CPU Priority Param
SIGMA Description: Detects command line parameter very often used with coin miners

False positives:
- Other tools that use a --cpu-priority flag

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=11 AND (LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a1%--cpu-priority%' OR LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a2%--cpu-priority%' OR LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a3%--cpu-priority%' OR LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a4%--cpu-priority%' OR LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a5%--cpu-priority%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%--cpu-priority%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%--cpu-priority%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Possible Coin Miner CPU Priority Param on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=11 AND (LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a1%--cpu-priority%' OR LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a2%--cpu-priority%' OR LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a3%--cpu-priority%' OR LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a4%--cpu-priority%' OR LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a5%--cpu-priority%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%--cpu-priority%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%--cpu-priority%') AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Possible Coin Miner CPU Priority Param

This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
